text_block_list.text: string

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wake up unusually early, but my morning brain can't come up with
anything to do, so I just head to my office early. On the way there,
though...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
OH! You're the trainer I met in the hallway the other day! This is
sudden, but are you free right now?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If you wouldn't mind, could you help me with my morning practice? I
know this is out of nowhere, but please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's working this hard first thing in the morning, and I am free, so I let her sweep me into an impromptu training session.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: HAAAH! Get fired up for the red-hot training routine! Step five!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Push those limits! Unleash a storm of squats!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: TYAAAAAH! Get that blood boiling for a red-hot step ten!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Now make those muscles burn—we're doing hyper-galactic knee-ups!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
DRAAAAH! The fire's still blazing strong! Red-hot routine, STEP
FIFTEEEEN!
choice_data_list:
R-real quick, can I ask what all the "red-hot"
stuff is about?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm glad you asked! It's a workout my dad taught me to get
pumped up for the day!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
He calls it the "X-TREME RED-HOT ROUTINE!" What do you think?
Super cool, right?!
choice_data_list: Wait, is your dad a trainer by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nope, not quite! He used to do kendo, but now he teaches kendo
classes for elementary schoolers. Running's a bit out of his
wheelhouse.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That didn't stop him, though. Back in preschool, I was super weak and
a total scaredy cat, but Dad worked hard to train me into who I am
now.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
He did all kinds of research on racing and took me out to run every
single day. I love him so much, and I've always wanted to grow up to
be just like him!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
...And there he stood. I was face-to-face with my old rival! We both
made it to nationals—and to the final match of the tournament!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text: A-and then what?! What happened next?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
A beam of light lit up the bamboo blade we once vowed upon,
then—oops, it looks like break time's over! The rest will have to wait
until you've finished your own red-hot training arc! C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Get that blood boiling for a red-hot step ten! ...And done! Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Impressive. You wanted to hear the story, but you grit your teeth and
finished training first! Good self-discipline is a powerful ally to any
athlete!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text: If you keep working toward your goals a little each day, I promise—you will face rivals and tournaments just as exciting as mine!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I can be super patient, and I'll practice every day! And then...
I'll be super strong like you, Dad!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I loved hearing Dad's wild stories about kendo, his friendship with his
rivals, and all the competitions they went to. They filled me with so
much inspiration!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why I enrolled in Tracen—so I could experience it all myself!
Meeting life-changing rivals... and challenging them to passionate,
red-hot duels!
choice_data_list: That's a nice dream to work towards.
That's a nice dream to work towards.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: YEAH! And the thing is, I'm—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ack, it's already been this long? Sorry, I gotta get back to the routine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We wrap up the break and I supervise the rest of her warm-up. When
we finish, the sun's fully up and other Umamusume are starting their
morning training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Um, if you've still got time, I'd appreciate a spotter for a lap around
the turf track. How about it? Can you watch?!
choice_data_list: ...Um, would that put strain on your nails?
...Um, would that put strain on your nails?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: HUH?! How do you know about that?!
choice_data_list: Sorry, I overheard your instructor yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory definitely has a talent for turf. I'm sure training on
dirt for now wouldn't prevent her from switching down the line.
There's no rush.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that, and I also pose the question that's been on my mind:
why is she so fixated on running turf at the Tracen Meet?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, that? Don't worry, it's actually pretty simple! I want—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Whoooosh!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bamboo Memory's train of thought is cut off by something—someone rushing past like a blast of wind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dirt blows at our feet as we stand frozen, looking over the fence to
see a racer glide smoothly over the neighboring lane's dew-tipped
turf.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As though to race Oguri Cap, Bamboo Memory takes off down the
dirt track.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Tch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Try as she may, though, hitting high speeds on dirt takes more work
than on turf. Oguri Cap's lead grows and grows...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I won't... lose!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Not to my... rival!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the massive gap between them, Bamboo Memory continues
charging after Oguri Cap, running the full track.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, uh... Sorry I took off like that without answering your question.
See, that runner just now—
choice_data_list: She's the reason you want to run turf?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, you could tell? I mean, Oguri's amazing, right? She's so fast!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The first time I saw her run, just bam! I knew then and there, she was the rival I was looking for.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sure of it. She's my destiny.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I want to challenge her! I want to overtake her! Even now, I wanna run
with her so bad, you have no idea!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So I've gotta switch tracks! Oguri's scheduled to run in the 1,600-meter turf race at the Tracen Meet, so I wanna face her there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I know that my nails are fragile, and I understand why my instructor
wants me to stick to dirt. I do trust her opinion, and I'm trying to
follow all her advice, but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's just, I can't help it. My head understands, but my heart wants to
run. Ever since meeting Oguri, I can tell—she's a part of my story!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can feel her passion. I know in my heart that nothing will stop Bamboo Memory now. She looks like a model student on the surface, but deep down, running's the only thing on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wish I could see what inspires her so... And my curiosity won't
smoulder away until I'm at her side, experiencing it all with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's too late to go back—I'm already part of Bamboo Memory's story
too.
